variables.input:
fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_FINDING"
     AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
     AND isNotNull(component.name)
| summarize rawValues = arrayRemoveNulls(arraySort(collectDistinct(event.provider)))
| fieldsAdd values = if(arraySize(rawValues) > 0, rawValues, else:"None")

fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_FINDING"
     AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
     AND isNotNull(component.name)
| summarize rawValues = arrayRemoveNulls(arraySort(collectDistinct(container_image.registry)))
| fieldsAdd values = if(arraySize(rawValues) > 0, rawValues, else:"None")

fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_FINDING"
     AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
     AND isNotNull(component.name)
| summarize rawValues = arrayRemoveNulls(arraySort(collectDistinct(container_image.repository)))
| fieldsAdd values = if(arraySize(rawValues) > 0, rawValues, else:"None")

fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_FINDING"
     AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
     AND isNotNull(component.name)
| summarize rawValues = arrayRemoveNulls(arraySort(collectDistinct(container_image.tags, expand:true)))
| fieldsAdd values = if(arraySize(rawValues) > 0, rawValues, else:"None")

fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_FINDING"
     AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
     AND isNotNull(component.name)
| summarize rawValues = arrayRemoveNulls(arraySort(collectDistinct(vulnerability.id)))
| fieldsAdd values = if(arraySize(rawValues) > 0, rawValues, else:"None")

fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_FINDING"
     AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
     AND isNotNull(component.name)
| summarize rawValues = arrayRemoveNulls(arraySort(collectDistinct(component.name)))
| fieldsAdd values = if(arraySize(rawValues) > 0, rawValues, else:"None")

fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_FINDING"
     AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
     AND isNotNull(component.name)
// now enrich the runtime context
| join [
    fetch dt.entity.container_group_instance, from:now()-1h
    | fieldsAdd entity.name, containerImageDigest, containerImageName, workloadName, containerStatus, processes=contains[dt.entity.process_group_instance]
], on:{left[container_image.digest]==right[containerImageDigest]}, kind:leftOuter,
   fields:{container_instance.id=id, container_instance.name=entity.name, container_image.name=containerImageName, containerStatus, processes}
| filter isNotNull(container_instance.id) AND contains(containerStatus, "running")
| append [
    fetch security.events
    | filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_FINDING"
         AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
         AND isNotNull(component.name)
    // now enrich the runtime context
    | join [
        fetch dt.entity.container_group_instance, from:now()-1h
        | fieldsAdd entity.name, containerImageId, containerImageName, workloadName, containerStatus, processes=contains[dt.entity.process_group_instance]
    ], on:{left[container_image.id]==right[containerImageId]}, kind:leftOuter,
       fields:{container_instance.id=id, container_instance.name=entity.name, container_image.name=containerImageName, containerStatus, processes}
    | filter isNotNull(container_instance.id) AND contains(containerStatus, "running")
]
| dedup {object.id, finding.id, container_instance.id}
| expand dt.entity.process=processes
| fieldsRemove processes
| join [
    fetch dt.entity.process_group_instance, from:now()-1h
], on:{left[dt.entity.process]==right[id]}, kind:leftOuter, fields:{releasesProduct, releasesStage}
| fieldsAdd releasesStage = if(isNull(releasesStage), "None", else:releasesStage)
| summarize rawValues = arrayRemoveNulls(arraySort(collectDistinct(releasesStage)))
| fields values = if(arraySize(rawValues) > 0, rawValues, else: "None")
| expand values

1.content:
# Runtime contextualization of container findings for alert reduction
Reduce noise from container vulnerability findings using runtime context. Learn more about [Security events ingest](https://dt-url.net/1d63p0v).

2.query:
fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_FINDING"
     AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
     AND isNotNull(component.name)
| dedup {object.id, vulnerability.id, component.name, component.version,
         container_image.registry, container_image.repository}, sort: {timestamp desc}
// dashboard variables
| filter in(event.provider, $Product)
     AND in(container_image.registry, $Registry)
     AND in(container_image.repository, $Repository)
     AND in(container_image.tags, $Tag)
     AND in(dt.security.risk.level, $RiskLevel)
     AND in(vulnerability.id, $Vulnerability)
     AND in(component.name, $Component)
// aggregation and custom filtering
| summarize {
    `Risk score`=toDouble(takeMax(dt.security.risk.score)),
    `Last finding`=takeMax(timestamp),
    `Container images`=countDistinctExact(container_image.digest)
    }, 
    by:{Vulnerability=vulnerability.id, `Risk level`=dt.security.risk.level}
| sort {`Risk score`, direction:"descending"}, {`Container images`, direction:"descending"}
| fields `Risk level`, Vulnerability, `Container images`
| limit 10

5.title: Critical risk
5.query:
fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_FINDING"
     AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
     AND isNotNull(component.name)
| dedup {object.id, vulnerability.id, component.name, component.version,
         container_image.registry, container_image.repository}, sort: {timestamp desc}
// dashboard variables
| filter in(event.provider, $Product)
     AND in(container_image.registry, $Registry)
     AND in(container_image.repository, $Repository)
     AND in(container_image.tags, $Tag)
     AND in(dt.security.risk.level, $RiskLevel)
     AND in(vulnerability.id, $Vulnerability)
     AND in(component.name, $Component)
// aggregation and custom filtering
| filter dt.security.risk.level=="CRITICAL"
| summarize {Vulnerabilities=countDistinctExact(vulnerability.id)}

6.title: High risk
6.query:
fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_FINDING"
     AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
     AND isNotNull(component.name)
| dedup {object.id, vulnerability.id, component.name, component.version,
         container_image.registry, container_image.repository}, sort: {timestamp desc}
// dashboard variables
| filter in(event.provider, $Product)
     AND in(container_image.registry, $Registry)
     AND in(container_image.repository, $Repository)
     AND in(container_image.tags, $Tag)
     AND in(dt.security.risk.level, $RiskLevel)
     AND in(vulnerability.id, $Vulnerability)
     AND in(component.name, $Component)
// aggregation and custom filtering
| filter dt.security.risk.level=="HIGH"
| summarize {Vulnerabilities=countDistinctExact(vulnerability.id)}

10.title: Number of vulnerabilities by risk
10.query:
fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_FINDING"
     AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
     AND isNotNull(component.name)
| dedup {object.id, vulnerability.id, component.name, component.version,
         container_image.registry, container_image.repository}, sort: {timestamp desc}
// dashboard variables
| filter in(event.provider, $Product)
     AND in(container_image.registry, $Registry)
     AND in(container_image.repository, $Repository)
     AND in(container_image.tags, $Tag)
     AND in(dt.security.risk.level, $RiskLevel)
     AND in(vulnerability.id, $Vulnerability)
     AND in(component.name, $Component)
// aggregation and custom filtering
| summarize {
    numberOfVulnerabilities = countDistinctExact(vulnerability.id),
    riskScore=takeMax(dt.security.risk.score)}, by:{dt.security.risk.level}
| sort riskScore desc

21.title: Percentage of vulnerabilities by funnel stage
21.query:
fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_FINDING"
     AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
     AND isNotNull(component.name)
| filter in(event.provider, $Product)
     AND in(container_image.registry, $Registry)
     AND in(container_image.repository, $Repository)
     AND in(container_image.tags, $Tag)
     AND in(dt.security.risk.level, $RiskLevel)
     AND in(vulnerability.id, $Vulnerability)
     AND in(component.name, $Component)
// now enrich the runtime context
| join [
    fetch dt.entity.container_group_instance, from:now()-1h
    | fieldsAdd entity.name, containerImageDigest, containerImageName, workloadName, containerStatus, processes=contains[dt.entity.process_group_instance]
], on:{left[container_image.digest]==right[containerImageDigest]}, kind:leftOuter,
   fields:{container_instance.id=id, container_instance.name=entity.name, container_image.name=containerImageName, containerStatus, processes}
| filter isNotNull(container_instance.id) AND contains(containerStatus, "running")
| append [
    fetch security.events
    | filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_FINDING"
         AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
         AND isNotNull(component.name)
    | filter in(event.provider, $Product)
     AND in(container_image.registry, $Registry)
     AND in(container_image.repository, $Repository)
     AND in(container_image.tags, $Tag)
     AND in(dt.security.risk.level, $RiskLevel)
     AND in(vulnerability.id, $Vulnerability)
     AND in(component.name, $Component)
    // now enrich the runtime context
    | join [
        fetch dt.entity.container_group_instance, from:now()-1h
        | fieldsAdd entity.name, containerImageId, containerImageName, workloadName, containerStatus, processes=contains[dt.entity.process_group_instance]
    ], on:{left[container_image.id]==right[containerImageId]}, kind:leftOuter,
       fields:{container_instance.id=id, container_instance.name=entity.name, container_image.name=containerImageName, containerStatus, processes}
    | filter isNotNull(container_instance.id) AND contains(containerStatus, "running")
]
| dedup {object.id, finding.id, container_instance.id}
| expand dt.entity.process=processes
| fieldsRemove processes
| join [
    fetch dt.entity.process_group_instance, from:now()-1h
], on:{left[dt.entity.process]==right[id]}, kind:leftOuter, fields:{releasesProduct, releasesStage}
| fieldsAdd releasesStage = if(isNull(releasesStage), "None", else:releasesStage)
| fieldsAdd types=if(releasesStage!="None" AND isNotNull(container_instance.id) AND in(releasesStage,$ProductStage),
                     array("All","Running","Running (prod)"),
              else:if(isNotNull(container_instance.id) AND contains(containerStatus, "running"), 
                     array("All","Running"),
              else:array("All")))
| expand type=types
| summarize Vulnerabilities=countDistinctExact(vulnerability.id), by:{`Funnel stage`=type}

30.title: Critical risk
30.query:
fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_FINDING"
     AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
     AND isNotNull(component.name)
| dedup {object.id, vulnerability.id, component.name, component.version,
         container_image.registry, container_image.repository}, sort: {timestamp desc}
// dashboard variables
| filter in(event.provider, $Product)
     AND in(container_image.registry, $Registry)
     AND in(container_image.repository, $Repository)
     AND in(container_image.tags, $Tag)
     AND in(dt.security.risk.level, $RiskLevel)
     AND in(vulnerability.id, $Vulnerability)
     AND in(component.name, $Component)
// now enrich the runtime context
| join [
    fetch dt.entity.container_group_instance, from:now()-3h
    | fieldsAdd entity.name, containerImageDigest, containerImageName, workloadName
], on:{left[container_image.digest]==right[containerImageDigest]}, kind:leftOuter,
   fields:{container_instance.id=id, container_instance.name=entity.name, 
           container_image.name=containerImageName, container_instance.status=containerStatus}
| append [
    fetch security.events
    | filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_FINDING"
         AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
         AND isNotNull(component.name)
    | dedup {object.id, vulnerability.id, component.name, component.version,
             container_image.registry, container_image.repository}, sort: {timestamp desc}
    // dashboard variables
    | filter in(event.provider, $Product)
         AND in(container_image.registry, $Registry)
         AND in(container_image.repository, $Repository)
         AND in(container_image.tags, $Tag)
         AND in(dt.security.risk.level, $RiskLevel)
         AND in(vulnerability.id, $Vulnerability)
         AND in(component.name, $Component)
    | join [
        fetch dt.entity.container_group_instance, from:now()-3h
        | fieldsAdd entity.name, containerImageId, containerImageName, workloadName
    ], on:{left[container_image.id]==right[containerImageId]}, kind:leftOuter,
       fields:{container_instance.id=id, container_instance.name=entity.name, 
               container_image.name=containerImageName, container_instance.status=containerStatus}
]
| dedup {object.id, finding.id, container_instance.id}
// filter for those that have running instances
| filter isNotNull(container_instance.id) AND contains(container_instance.status, "running")
// aggregation and custom filtering
| filter dt.security.risk.level=="CRITICAL"
| summarize {Vulnerabilities=countDistinctExact(vulnerability.id)}

    | fieldsAdd entity.name, containerImageDigest, containerImageName, workloadName, containerStatus, processes=contains[dt.entity.process_group_instance]

    | filter in(event.provider, $Product)
     AND in(container_image.registry, $Registry)
     AND in(container_image.repository, $Repository)
     AND in(container_image.tags, $Tag)
     AND in(dt.security.risk.level, $RiskLevel)
     AND in(vulnerability.id, $Vulnerability)
     AND in(component.name, $Component)
    // now enrich the runtime context
    | join [
        fetch dt.entity.container_group_instance, from:now()-1h
        | fieldsAdd entity.name, containerImageId, containerImageName, workloadName, containerStatus, processes=contains[dt.entity.process_group_instance]
    ], on:{left[container_image.id]==right[containerImageId]}, kind:leftOuter,
       fields:{container_instance.id=id, container_instance.name=entity.name, container_image.name=containerImageName, containerStatus, processes}
    | filter isNotNull(container_instance.id) AND contains(containerStatus, "running")
]
| dedup {object.id, finding.id, container_instance.id}
| expand dt.entity.process=processes
| fieldsRemove processes
| join [
    fetch dt.entity.process_group_instance, from:now()-1h
], on:{left[dt.entity.process]==right[id]}, kind:leftOuter, fields:{releasesProduct, releasesStage}
| fieldsAdd releasesStage = if(isNull(releasesStage), "None", else:releasesStage)
| filter releasesStage!="None" AND in(releasesStage,$ProductStage)
// aggregation and custom filtering
| filter dt.security.risk.level=="MEDIUM"
| summarize {Vulnerabilities=countDistinctExact(vulnerability.id)}

40.query:
fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_FINDING"
     AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
     AND isNotNull(component.name)
| dedup {object.id, vulnerability.id, component.name, component.version,
         container_image.registry, container_image.repository}, sort: {timestamp desc}
// dashboard variables
| filter in(event.provider, $Product)
     AND in(container_image.registry, $Registry)
     AND in(container_image.repository, $Repository)
     AND in(container_image.tags, $Tag)
     AND in(dt.security.risk.level, $RiskLevel)
     AND in(vulnerability.id, $Vulnerability)
     AND in(component.name, $Component)
// now enrich the runtime context
| join [
    fetch dt.entity.container_group_instance, from:now()-3h
    | fieldsAdd entity.name, containerImageDigest, containerImageName, workloadName
], on:{left[container_image.digest]==right[containerImageDigest]}, kind:leftOuter,
   fields:{container_instance.id=id, container_instance.name=entity.name, 
           container_image.name=containerImageName, container_instance.status=containerStatus}
| append [
    fetch security.events
    | filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_FINDING"
         AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
         AND isNotNull(component.name)
    | dedup {object.id, vulnerability.id, component.name, component.version,
             container_image.registry, container_image.repository}, sort: {timestamp desc}
    // dashboard variables
    | filter in(event.provider, $Product)
         AND in(container_image.registry, $Registry)
         AND in(container_image.repository, $Repository)
         AND in(container_image.tags, $Tag)
         AND in(dt.security.risk.level, $RiskLevel)
         AND in(vulnerability.id, $Vulnerability)
         AND in(component.name, $Component)
    | join [
        fetch dt.entity.container_group_instance, from:now()-3h
        | fieldsAdd entity.name, containerImageId, containerImageName, workloadName
    ], on:{left[container_image.id]==right[containerImageId]}, kind:leftOuter,
       fields:{container_instance.id=id, container_instance.name=entity.name, 
               container_image.name=containerImageName, container_instance.status=containerStatus}
]
// filter for those that have running instances
| filter isNotNull(container_instance.id) AND contains(container_instance.status, "running")
// aggregation and custom filtering
| dedup {object.id, vulnerability.id, component.name,
         container_image.registry, container_image.repository, container_image.tags}, sort: {timestamp desc}
| summarize {
    `Risk score`=toDouble(takeMax(dt.security.risk.score)),
    `Last finding`=takeMax(timestamp),
    `Container images`=countDistinctExact(container_image.digest)
    }, 
    by:{Vulnerability=vulnerability.id, `Risk level`=dt.security.risk.level}
| sort {`Risk score`, direction:"descending"}, {`Container images`, direction:"descending"}
| fields `Risk level`, Vulnerability, `Container images`
| limit 10
